programs.title: A Plan to Kill
programs.sub_title: Love, Death and Obsession in Hollywood
programs.desc: A popular therapist suffers a deadly attack in her Hollywood Hills home and police must trace a trail of deadly obsession and rage to find her killer.

programs.title: A Plan to Kill
programs.desc: The murder of a popular hairdresser in Cleveland leaves police stunned and desperate for answers; an unexpected break comes when a routine traffic stop in a neighboring county uncovers a vicious and deadly plot no one saw coming.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: A California woman's two former husbands are mysteriously murdered, nearly 20 years apart.

programs.title: Dateline
programs.desc: When a South Carolina coroner arrives at the scene of a car accident to find his friend deceased, he notices some unusual markings on her face and begins to think her death looks suspicious.

programs.title: Final Moments
programs.desc: Yingying Zhang, a student at the University of Illinois, misses a campus bus by seconds and then vanishes; as police trace the final moments before she disappeared, they discover a dark secret on campus that takes the case in a shocking direction.
